TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjailjaking ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 240 buwan, 875 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 820 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 55 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 84%, Rukay 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjailjaking hya' ga Sagaran. tay mkyahu' na Tjailjaking hya' ga Timur. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tjailjakiŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu s~…ēantimon …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, ő≤unun *%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na tjailjakiŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēa…£aran. taj mkjańßu Ē na tjailjakiŇč ńßja Ē …£a timur. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Tjailjaking ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 240 buwan, 875 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 820 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 55 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 84%, Rukay 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjailjaking hya' ga Sagaran. tay mkyahu' na Tjailjaking hya' ga Timur. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tjailjakiŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu s~…ēantimon …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, ő≤unun *%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na tjailjakiŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēa…£aran. taj mkjańßu Ē na tjailjakiŇč ńßja Ē …£a timur. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
